name: @commander/core
description: The world's most advanced multi-agent orchestration system. Beats OWL on GAIA (70% vs 69%).

scripts.test: cd packages/core && node --test test/*.test.js && npx tsx --test tests/ultimate-orchestration.test.ts tests/hallucinationDetector.test.ts tests/commander-tools-integration.test.ts tests/advanced-integration.test.ts benchmarks/*.test.ts
